label: Staking
description: Stake or unstake tokens across protocols. Shows protocol APY, yield earned, TVL, and unbonding period.

0.6.note: FormWidget accepts isLoading; context is synchronous mock with no async loading — wired isLoading={false} to document intent.

0.8.note: submission errors displayed via FormWidget error={error} from useFormSubmit; WidgetErrorBoundary covers crashes; context exposes no context-level error field.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[defi-trading]. 0.3 availableOn=[defi]. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no lib/mocks imports in widget. 0.6 FormWidget accepts isLoading; context is synchronous mock with no async loading — wired isLoading={false} to document intent. 0.7 empty guard via if(!selected) present. 0.8 submission errors displayed via FormWidget error={error} from useFormSubmit; WidgetErrorBoundary covers crashes; context exposes no context-level error field. 0.9 no dead code.

1.3.note: — adjustedStakingProtocols memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx).

1.4.note: — clientIds destructured and acknowledged in context; StakingProtocol has no clientId field so full narrowing requires schema change (BP-5 scope).

1.5.note: for tradeHistory; stakingProtocols is a protocol reference list (not strategy data) so strategyId filter is N/A.

1.7.note: known-gap — STAKING_PROTOCOLS in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — data via useDeFiData(). 1.2 pass — context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 pass — adjustedStakingProtocols memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx). 1.4 partial — clientIds destructured and acknowledged in context; StakingProtocol has no clientId field so full narrowing requires schema change (BP-5 scope). 1.5 pass for tradeHistory; stakingProtocols is a protocol reference list (not strategy data) so strategyId filter is N/A. 1.6 pass — empty organizationIds returns all data (hasDefiDesk=true). 1.7 known-gap — STAKING_PROTOCOLS in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch: STAKE/UNSTAKE buttons should be disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but does not consume scope.mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: execute button disabled; protocol APY and TVL still displayed.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4: Human must verify batch-mode execute button disable.

4.1.note: Stake/Unstake buttons and 25/50/75/100% quick-fill buttons are functional.

5.1.note: Target strategies: YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE (Lido, EtherFi, Rocket Pool). Operations: STAKE, UNSTAKE.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 11 tests covering render + empty-protocols branch, expected APY, operation toggle STAKE/UNSTAKE, reactive annual yield, execute-button enable/disable and STAKE/UNSTAKE payload shape + side flip. See tests/widgets/defi/defi-staking-widget.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline objects in useEffect/useMemo deps.

l7.notes: Annual yield label still contains '(mock)' — deferred to content review pass.

8.1.note: text-[10px] at lines 66, 90 migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Button, Input, Select from components/ui/*. FormWidget used.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Inputs have label wrappers. Human: keyboard pass required.

mergeCandidate.rationale: Staking execution + rewards tracking are closely related; could be merged into a tabbed widget.

relationships.notes: Peer with defi-staking-rewards (both deal with staking lifecycle). Merge candidate for review.

dataContract.notes: Production: REST to staking protocol service. APY and TVL need periodic refresh (suggest interval:60s).

gaps.notes: YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE §10 DeFi (Ethereum)/staking: Ether.fi capability declaration minor pending
YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE §10 DeFi/staking (multi-LST rotation): Rotation mode exists in code but no instance declared
CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED §8 DeFi (Ethereum)/staking + lending (recursive): Alt lending protocols declared in UAC but not full recursive-loop tested

findings.description: 0.6 Context exposes no isLoading field (synchronous mock data). FormWidget loading infra is wired with isLoading={false} to document that loading path was considered. No fix needed until context gains async loading.

0.8 Context exposes no context-level error field. Submission errors are handled via useFormSubmit + FormWidget error prop. Crash errors covered by WidgetErrorBoundary. Acceptable for mock-data context.
1.3 stakingProtocols list not filtered by org scope — fixed: adjustedStakingProtocols memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk.
1.4 No client-level filter cascade for stakingProtocols. clientIds now destructured and acknowledged; StakingProtocol has no clientId field — narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change.
1.7 STAKING_PROTOCOLS reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-staking instead of lib/constants/ or lib/config/. Moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.
STAKE/UNSTAKE button called executeDeFiOrder without checking scope.mode; batch-mode (as-of historical) should be read-only.
findings.fix: 2026-04-21 added global guard inside defi-data-context executeDeFiOrder — isBatch branch returns early with a console.warn so no widget writes to the mock ledger in batch mode. Per-widget check is redundant once the context layer enforces this.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — adjustedStakingProtocols memo with hasDefiDesk guard
